content: AirConsole SDK API: message-passing model — airconsole.message(deviceId, data) to send, onmessage(deviceId, data) callback to receive. Device IDs are assigned by platform, not sequential. Screen and controller are separate HTML files both including the AirConsole JS. Device motion enabled via opts.device_motion = intervalMs on AirConsole constructor. vibrate() for haptic feedback. View Manager for switching controller layouts. onConnect/onDisconnect callbacks for player lifecycle. onDeviceStateChange for player metadata. The API is intentionally minimal — no raw sensor stream, no orientation quaternion API, just message-passing plus optional device_motion interval. This is a key differentiator opportunity for ImmersiveRT: expose quaternion/displacement API rather than raw message passing.
